Rationale: To support new versions of the @actions/* packages and ensure compatibility with Node.js 24 and newer features. The migration to ESM modules and enforcement of hash checks improve security and performance.
Author: dependabot[bot]
Description: actions/download-artifact version upgrade in Project-MONAI/MONAI repository
Cost: Not explicitly stated in the document
Risk: Potential breaking changes due to ESM migration, hash mismatch errors by default, and Node.js 24 requirements. Forks may need significant changes.

Argument.author: actions/download-artifact release notes
Argument.argument: actions/download-artifact@v8 has been migrated to an ESM module, which may require forks to make significant changes.

Argument.author: actions/download-artifact release notes
Argument.argument: Hash mismatches will now error by default, improving security but requiring users to override this behavior if needed.

Argument.author: actions/download-artifact release notes
Argument.argument: Direct downloads no longer attempt to unzip all files; the action checks the Content-Type header ahead of unzipping, skipping non-zipped files.

Argument.author: actions/download-artifact release notes
Argument.argument: To support direct uploads in actions/upload-artifact, the action will no longer attempt to unzip all downloaded files.

Justification: The decision involves upgrading a GitHub Actions tool ('actions/download-artifact'), which is part of CI/CD infrastructure rather than the ML lifecycle. Keywords like 'upgrade', 'compatibility', and 'security' relate to DevOps tooling, not ML-specific artifacts.
